# kQLPreviewOptionCursorKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Quick Look ](/documentation/quicklook)

- [ kQLPreviewOptionCursorKey ](/documentation/quicklook/kqlpreviewoptioncursorkey)

-  kQLPreviewOptionCursorKey 

Global Variable# kQLPreviewOptionCursorKey

macOS 10.6–12.0Deprecated

```
let kQLPreviewOptionCursorKey: CFString!
```

Deprecated

Use a QLPreviewingController in a Preview Extension to provide previews for your file types.

## [See Also](/documentation/quicklook/kqlpreviewoptioncursorkey#see-also)
